summary: Iteration 51: Testing new features - App Videos, Admin Offers Editor, Media Target, Account Deletion, Auth Session intended_role. All backend APIs verified working. Frontend components verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/app-config - Returns opening_video_url and free_offers_video_url fields - WORKING
GET /api/admin/app-videos - Returns video URLs for admin - WORKING
GET /api/admin/all-offers - Returns all offers with city and establishment_name - WORKING
PUT /api/admin/offers/{offer_id} - Updates title, city, description - WORKING
GET /api/account-deletion - Returns HTML page for LGPD/Google Play compliance - WORKING
Frontend Home: Categories (y=111) are ABOVE 'Ofertas de graca' button (y=162) - VERIFIED
Frontend Home: 'Ofertas de graca' button has green background (#10B981) with gold border (#FFD700) - VERIFIED
Frontend Admin Media tab: Target selector with Clientes/Estabelecimentos/Ambos buttons - VERIFIED
Frontend Admin Media tab: Videos do App section with opening and free offers video inputs - VERIFIED

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 endpoints verified working via curl and pytest)

test_credentials.admin_access_key: admin123 (via long press on iToke logo)

seed_data_creation: Test video URLs set via PUT /api/admin/app-videos: opening_video_url=https://youtube.com/watch?v=test_opening_123, free_offers_video_url=https://youtube.com/watch?v=test_free_456
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested new features: (1) App Videos - opening_video_url and free_offers_video_url stored in platform_settings with key 'app_videos', (2) Admin Offers Editor - GET /api/admin/all-offers returns enriched offers with establishment_name and city, PUT /api/admin/offers/{offer_id} updates title/city/description, (3) Media Target - POST /api/admin/media accepts target parameter (client/establishment/both), (4) Account Deletion - GET /api/account-deletion returns HTML page for LGPD compliance, (5) Auth Session - POST /api/auth/session accepts intended_role parameter. Frontend verified: categories above CTA button, green button with gold border, admin media tab has target selector and videos section.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/app-videos: Returns video URLs for admin - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/all-offers: Returns offers with city and establishment_name - WORKING

frontend_components.CTA button styling: Green background (#10B981) with gold border (#FFD700) - VERIFIED
frontend_components.Admin Media tab - Videos section: Video de Abertura and Video Ofertas Gratis inputs with Salvar Videos button - VERIFIED
